bottom_tabs.container: fixed bottom-0 w-full bg-white border-t border-slate-100 flex justify-between items-center px-6 py-3 pb-safe z-50
bottom_tabs.tab_inactive: flex flex-col items-center text-slate-400 hover:text-slate-600 gap-1

contact_card.container: bg-white rounded-3xl p-4 flex items-center justify-between border border-slate-100 mb-3 active:scale-[0.98] transition-transform
contact_card.avatar_wrapper: w-12 h-12 rounded-full bg-slate-100 flex items-center justify-center shrink-0
contact_card.name: font-semibold text-slate-900 text-lg line-clamp-1

excel_grid.wrapper: bg-white rounded-2xl border border-slate-200 overflow-hidden shadow-sm
excel_grid.th: px-4 py-3 font-semibold text-xs uppercase tracking-wider border-b border-slate-800

badges.method_pill: px-3 py-1 rounded-full text-[10px] uppercase tracking-widest inline-flex items-center justify-center
badges.balance_badge: px-2 py-1 rounded text-[10px] uppercase tracking-bold font-bold

buttons.primary: bg-blue-600 active:bg-blue-700 text-white rounded-2xl py-4 px-6 font-bold flex items-center justify-center w-full transition-colors
buttons.fab: fixed bottom-24 right-6 w-14 h-14 bg-blue-600 text-white rounded-full flex items-center justify-center z-40 active:scale-95 transition-transform

summary_card.title: text-slate-400 text-sm font-medium uppercase tracking-wider mb-2
summary_card.breakdown_row: flex justify-between items-center py-2 border-t border-slate-800

instructions_to_main_agent: Build a mobile-first React SPA using standard React, Tailwind CSS, and Lucide React. It should look and feel like a native app.
Import Inter for general text and JetBrains Mono for all numbers (balances, dates, quantities) to achieve the requested look.
Implement the Excel Grid component with robust horizontal scrolling. The header row should be `bg-slate-900 text-white`.
The UI needs bottom tabs that are fixed to the bottom. Add extra padding (`pb-24`) to the main content area so nothing is hidden behind the tabs.
Implement absolute values for balances (no minus signs) and strictly follow the color rules: Positive balance (Debe) = Red, Negative balance (A Favor) = Blue, Zero balance (Saldado) = Green.
All interactive elements MUST include `data-testid` attributes (e.g., `data-testid="tab-clientes"`, `data-testid="btn-add-contact"`).
Add 'LISTO' rounded blue button in a dark footer bar for the master detail view.
Ensure input forms (add contact, add transaction) use modern mobile patterns (full screen or large bottom sheets).
